Wikipeda_FirstSentence: Lando Norris ( ; born 13 November 1999) is a  British racing driver who competes in Formula One for McLaren.
KG_DetailedSummary: Lando Norris is a British racing driver who competes in Formula One for McLaren. Norris won the Formula One World Drivers' Championship in 2025 with McLaren, and has won 11 Grands Prix across eight seasons.
